name: Sweet & Sour Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions and arrange in a 1-quart baking dish.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients and pour over the onions.
3. Bake at 300 degrees for 1 hour. Yield: 4 - 6 servings
4. Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLES EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE (consider reducing margarine to lower fat content to less than 1 exchange, even as low as 1/2 fat).
